CRANK_RUNTIME_001 — heap exhaustion during traced turn.

Process heap cap (default 10MB) is hit during `Crank.PurityTrace.trace_pure/2`.
The worker is killed by the BEAM and the trace returns
`{:resource_exhausted, :heap, partial_trace}`.

Exercised by:
- test/crank/purity_trace_test.exs — the heap-exhaustion test that
  builds an unbounded list inside a turn.
